allies.rationale_text: Growth-mindset gives persistence-grit the belief that hard effort can actually build capacity over time.
allies.source_quote: behavioral expression of the Growth Mindset

allies.rationale_text: Deliberate-practice gives persistence-grit a structured way to turn endurance into improvement rather than mere repetition.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Persistence-grit conflicts with sunk-cost-fallacy when continued effort becomes escalation despite failing evidence.
Persistence-grit conflicts with commitment-bias when identity-level resolve blocks a needed strategic pivot.
Persistence-grit conflicts with confirmation-bias when people selectively notice evidence that continued effort is working.
